# Portfolio Website Development Instructions

This is a premium, modern portfolio website for A. Badusha featuring:
- Framer Motion
- Glassmorphism design with dark theme (blue/purple accents)
- Smooth animations and micro-interactions
- Fully responsive design
- Particle effects and parallax animations
- Dark/light mode toggle
- Accessibility (WCAG) best practices

## Project Structure
- `/app` - App pages and layouts
- `/components` - Reusable components
- `/public` - Static assets
- `/styles` - Global styles
- `/utils` - Helper functions and constants

## Key Features
- Hero section with typing animation
- About section with career timeline
- Skills section with animated progress bars
- Projects showcase with hover effects
- Experience & Education timeline
- Services section
- Testimonials slider
- Blog section with filters
- Contact form with validation
- Dark/Light mode toggle
- Custom cursor effects
